title: Auth+
description: A Plugin that adds authentication to minecraft servers
body:
# Auth+

Auth+ is a lightweight and secure authentication plugin designed to protect your Minecraft server by requiring players to register and log in before playing.

The plugin restricts movement, interaction, and combat until authentication is complete, ensuring fair gameplay and preventing unauthorized access.

## 🔑 Features
- Simple and secure player authentication
- Registration with password confirmation
- Login required on join
- Blindness and movement lock until authenticated
- Collision disabled while unauthenticated
- Periodic chat reminders for login/register
- Clean, color-coded messages

## 🛡 Admin Features
- Reset player passwords
- Permission-based admin commands
- Config reload support

## 📜 Commands
- /register <password> <confirm password>
- /login <password>
- /auth resetpw <player> <newpassword>
- /auth reload

## 🔐 Permissions
- auth.admin – Access admin commands
- auth.use – Use authentication commands

## 📂 Configuration
- playerdata.yml – Stores player authentication data
- messages.yml – Fully customizable messages
- config.yml – General plugin settings

Auth+ focuses on simplicity, security, and performance, making it ideal for servers that want an easy-to-use authentication system without unnecessary complexity.
